channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu
item.description: Pick up to 10 half-portions of soups, salads, or sandwiches at just $4.99 each — about 40% off regular prices. (Ongoing)

item.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe: National Ice Cream Day: Free Smoothie with $20+ Order
item.guid: Tropical Smoothie Cafe-National Ice Cream Day: Free Smoothie wi-2026-07-19
item.description: Order $20 or more this week and get a free smoothie — part of Sweet Treat Week July 16–22. (Through July 22, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — a revived fan-favorite bundle for soccer season. (Limited time)

item.title: Dairy Queen: National Ice Cream Day: Free Dilly Bar with $1 App Purchase
item.guid: Dairy Queen-National Ice Cream Day: Free Dilly Bar w-2026-07-19
item.description: Grab a free Dilly Bar when you make any $1 or more purchase in the DQ app today — last day of this National Ice Cream Day promo. (Through July 19, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings-2026-07-19
item.description: Get any Domino's pizza with any crust and any toppings for just $9.99 each — Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu — Chicken, Tenders & Shrimp
item.guid: Popeyes-$5 Faves Menu — Chicken, Tenders & S-2026-07-19
item.description: Choose from 3-piece Signature Chicken, 3-piece Tenders, a Chicken Sandwich, or 8-piece Butterfly Shrimp for just $5 — order in store, online, or in app. (Through August 30, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders — Any Style
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time. (Limited time)

item.title: Subway: BOGO 50% Off All Footlong Subs
item.description: Buy one footlong sub and get a second footlong 50% off — valid all day today (Sunday) for Sub Club members through July 20. (Through July 20, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box
item.description: Get a McDouble or McChicken, 4-piece McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 in the McDonald's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Build your own $5 meal daily in the BK app — a reliable everyday value with burger, sides, and drink options. (Ongoing)

item.title: Whataburger: Whatadeal Value Menu from $3
item.description: Late-night savers can grab the Big Ranch Wrap starting at $3, Whatachick'n Bites for $4, or a Whataburger Jr. for $5 — add small fries and drink for ~$2.50 more. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jack in the Box: 2 Tacos for $1.19 In-App
item.guid: Jack in the Box-2 Tacos for $1.19 In-App-2026-07-19
item.description: Jack in the Box's iconic late-night deal — two crispy seasoned beef tacos for just $1.19 via the app at most 24-hour locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: America 250 Limited-Time Menu
item.description: Denny's 'The Clock's Off' new menu is available around the clock at participating locations — including new breakfast, lunch, and dinner dishes available 24 hours. (Through August 18, 2026)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Fill up with a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho cheese, and a medium drink for $5.99 in the app. (Ongoing)
